institution.name: The University of Texas Health Science Center at Houston

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The University of Texas Health Science Center at Houston fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 (685 → 465).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 31% at The University of Texas Health Science Center at Houston vs the 2018–2022 baseline (460 vs 663).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The University of Texas Health Science Center at Houston rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.0k → $12.5k).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The University of Texas Health Science Center at Houston are 63% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($88.8k vs $54.5k).
